channel.title: Blog Feed - Center for Internet Security
channel.description: Industry news, product updates, videos, infographics, and more from CIS.

image.title: Blog Feed - Center for Internet Security

item.title: CIS Benchmarks July 2026 Update
item.description: These CIS Benchmarks and CIS Build Kits have been updated or recently released and include a full changelog that references all changes.

item.title: Turning Secure Software Development into a Measurable Practice
item.description: CIS and SAFECode have updated Secure by Design: A Developer’s Guide to Building Safer Software to address the role of AI on software security.

item.title: 5 Major Emerging Risks to Large-Scale Events
item.description: To create safer, more secure large-scale events, read our recommendations for defending against five emerging risks to public gatherings.

item.title: Cybersecurity Grant Funding: FEMA Clarifies SLCGP Use for CIS Services
item.description: FEMA clarifies that SLCGP/TCGP grants can fund CIS Services. See what qualifies, what's required, and what's next.

item.title: 6 Key Takeaways: Strengthening Public Safety Through Collective Defense
item.description: Here are six key takeaways from a CIS webinar for how U.S. SLTT agencies can strengthen public safety through collective defense.

item.title: CIS Controls Accreditation Drives Global Cybersecurity Standards
item.description: CIS Controls Accreditation is raising global cybersecurity standards, setting a trusted benchmark for excellence, resilience, and best practices.

item.title: CIS Benchmarks June 2026 Update
item.description: The following CIS Benchmarks and CIS Build Kits have been updated or recently released. We've highlighted the major updates below.

item.title: Keep up with HIPAA Expectations amid Growing Cyber Threats
item.description: Healthcare organizations can satisfy cybersecurity and HIPAA compliance obligations while upholding patient safety. Read on to learn how.

item.title: CIS Controls Community Volunteer Spotlight: Diego Bolatti
item.description: Diego Bolatti advances CIS Controls adoption for SMEs through research, policy templates, and AI-driven cybersecurity tools.

item.title: The Return of MCAP: Malware Analysis Built for SLTT Members
item.description: Our Malicious Code Analysis Platform (MCAP) supports malware analysis specifically designed for SLTT teams. Read our blog post to learn more.

item.title: Cybersecurity Hygiene Reinforced by the 2026 Verizon DBIR
item.description: The 2026 Verizon DBIR highlights how CIS Controls and CIS Benchmarks strengthen cybersecurity hygiene and defend against today's top attacks.

item.title: CIS Benchmarks May 2026 Update
item.description: The following CIS Benchmarks and CIS Build Kits have been updated or recently released. We've highlighted the major updates below.

item.title: Securing the Integration Protocol
item.description: Secure the protocol layer of AI systems with the CIS MCP Companion Guide, covering authorization, tool access, and execution controls.

item.title: 5 Steps to Help Secure Your City before a Large-Scale Event
item.description: Have a large-scale event coming up? Here are five mitigation measures as part of a comprehensive approach to secure your city.

item.title: Securing Agents and Autonomous Behavior
item.description: Learn how the CIS AI Agent Companion Guide helps secure the agent layer of AI systems, governing autonomy, tool use, memory, and multi‑agent behavior.

item.title: Standing Strong Together: The Resilient Spirit of the SLTT Cybersecurity Community
item.description: More than 5,000 in the U.S. SLTT cybersecurity community have affirmed their belief that collaboration in the MS-ISAC is essential. Read more.

item.title: CIS Benchmarks April 2026 Update
item.description: The following CIS Benchmarks and CIS Build Kits have been updated or recently released. We've highlighted the major updates below. Each Benchmark and

item.title: Securing the AI Ecosystem Begins at the Model Layer
item.description: Download our three Companion Guides to learn how to stay aligned to the CIS Controls in your real-world AI environments.

item.title: Mythos AI: What Actually Matters for Cybersecurity Leaders
item.description: AI‑driven vulnerability discovery as embodied in Mythos represents an increase in speed and volume. But it does not invalidate what works.

item.title: Applying the CIS Controls to Real‑World AI Environments
item.description: Download our three Companion Guides to learn how to stay aligned to the CIS Controls in your real-world AI environments.

item.title: Follow-on Impressions from RSAC 2026: Insights from Tony Sager
item.description: After RSAC 2026 Conference, Tony Sager shares his reflections on the patterns and questions that stayed with him after the rush faded.

item.title: From Community to Cloud: How CIS Hardened Images Turn Best Practices into Secure Deployment
item.description: CIS Benchmarks and CIS Hardened Images enable secure cloud deployment, reduce misconfigurations, and enforce consistent security baselines.

item.title: MacSync Stealer Campaign Impacting U.S. SLTT macOS Users
item.description: An ongoing MacSync Stealer campaign is targeting macOS users in U.S. SLTT government organizations. Learn more by reading CIS CTI's analysis.

item.title: Vimeo-Themed Phishing Campaign Targeting Personal and Banking Data
item.description: CIS CTI has identified an ongoing Vimeo-themed phishing campaign impacting U.S. SLTTs. Read the team's analysis to learn how to stay safe.

item.title: IRS-Themed Phishing Granting Threat Actors Remote Access
item.description: The CIS CTI team spotted an ongoing campaign targeting SLTT government entities with tax- and IRS-themed phishing lures. Take a closer look.

item.title: What’s on My Radar for RSAC 2026: Insights from Tony Sager
item.description: Ahead of RSAC 2026 Conference, Tony Sager shares his thoughts about upcoming sessions and how he navigates the conference.

item.title: ZPHP Campaign Delivering Remcos RAT Impacting SLTTs
item.description: CIS CTI identified an ongoing ZPHP campaign impacting U.S. SLTTs that delivers the Remcos RAT. Find out how to defend your organization.

item.title: 2025 Year in Review: Sustaining Cybersecurity
item.description: CIS sustained vital protections despite funding cuts and rising multidimensional threats. Learn more by watching our 2025 Year in Review 2025 video.

item.title: CIS Benchmarks March 2026 Update
item.description: Here is an overview of the CIS Benchmarks that the Center for Internet Security (CIS) updated or released for March 2026.

item.title: Strengthening Software Assurance Across Government Systems
item.description: Secure by Design ultimately supports a broader public mission: delivering trustworthy, secure, and sustainable technology that citizens can rely on.

item.title: How to Defend Against Iran's Cyber Retaliation Playbook
item.description: Security leaders must give equal weight to the cyber dimension following U.S.-Israeli kinetic activity against Iran. Here's our recommendations.

item.title: Multiply Endpoint Security's Force at Your Public Utility
item.description: A public utility can multiply the force of endpoint security with a 24x7x365 protection and monitoring strategy. Read our blog to learn more.

item.title: Upholding U.S. SLTT Resilience with Affordable Services
item.description: The MS-ISAC bridges the U.S. SLTT resilience gap by offering under-resourced organizations access to affordable services. Read to learn more.

item.title: CIS Benchmarks February 2026 Update
item.description: Here is an overview of the CIS Benchmarks that the Center for Internet Security (CIS) updated or released for February 2026.

item.title: Top 10 Malware Q4 2025
item.description: Total malware notifications from MS-ISAC monitoring services increased 7% from Q3 to Q4 2025. Learn more by reading our Top 10 Malware list.

item.title: CIS Hardened Images Now in the AWS European Sovereign Cloud
item.description: CIS Hardened Images are now in the AWS European Sovereign Cloud. Learn how this can help you to reduce risk, improve consistency, and more.

item.title: CIS Benchmarks January 2026 Update
item.description: Here is an overview of the CIS Benchmarks that the Center for Internet Security (CIS) updated or released for January 2026.

item.title: Security in the Cloud with More Automation
item.description: CIS is making security in the cloud even easier for you by releasing a CIS hardening component in EC2 Image Builder on Amazon Web Services (AWS).

item.title: Cybersecurity Collaboration for the U.S. SLTT Community
item.description: The MS-ISAC provides the only nationwide network dedicated to cybersecurity collaboration in the U.S. SLTT community. Read on to learn more.

item.title: Malicious Crystal PDF Converter Detected on SLTT Networks
item.description: In October 2025, CIS CTI observed a rise in CIS MDR alerts associated with Crystal PDF on U.S. SLTT endpoints. Here's how to defend yourself.

item.title: CIS Benchmarks December 2025 Update
item.description: Here is an overview of the CIS Benchmarks that the Center for Internet Security (CIS) updated or released for December 2025.

item.title: Scale Linux Workload Security on Azure with CIS Benchmarks
item.description: Looking to automate Azure Linux hardening and streamline hybrid security? Learn how to do it at scale with Azure OSConfig and the CIS Benchmarks.

item.title: CIS Benchmarks Update November 2025
item.description: The November 2025 CIS Benchmarks monthly update highlights the CIS Benchmarks and CIS Build Kits that have been updated or recently released.

item.title: Control Assist: A Path to Cyber Insurance Readiness for SMBs
item.description: CIS and CyberAcuView have launched Control Assist, an initiative designed to simplify cyber insurance and strengthen cybersecurity for SMBs.

item.title: Impact of Federal Funding Cuts to the Value of MS-ISAC CTI
item.description: The adoption of a fee-based membership model has had minimal and in some aspects positive impact on MS-ISAC CTI. Read our blog to learn more.

item.title: Top 10 Malware Q3 2025
item.description: Total malware notifications from MS-ISAC monitoring services increased 38% from Q2 to Q3 2025. Learn more by reading our Top 10 Malware list.

item.title: 7 CIS Experts' 2026 Cybersecurity Predictions
item.description: What does 2026 have in store for cybersecurity? Read our experts' 2026 cybersecurity predictions to find out and get planning.

item.title: CIS Benchmarks Monthly Update October 2025
item.description: We've highlighted the major updates for CIS Benchmarks and CIS Build Kits in the Benchmarks Monthly Update for October 2025.

item.title: MS-ISAC Member-Reported Phishing Likely from Tycoon2FA PhaaS
item.description: The CIS CTI team saw an uptick in member-submitted phishing emails in Q3 2025. Learn the overlap these emails have with the Tycoon2FA PhaaS kit.

item.title: How Secure by Design Helps Developers Build Secure Software
item.description: Secure by Design offers practical, risk-based strategies for integrating security into the software development lifecycle.
